title: Interim message sent at 15s when agent takes too long
evidence: All 3 TC-020 tests passed in 24ms (377/377 total, 56 files): - ✓ TC-020: sends "⏳ Working on it..." after 15s when tenant delays 20s — `dmTexts.includes('⏳ Working on it...')` confirmed after `advanceTimersByTimeAsync(15_001)` - ✓ TC-020: interim message sent only once — `interimCount === 1` after advancing to 19999ms - ✓ TC-020: final agent response posted after 20s delay — `'Here is your answer after 20 seconds'` in `dmTexts` after advancing past 20s and awaiting `processPromise`
